/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang -Wall  -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libri.dylib -install_name @rpath/libri.dylib CMakeFiles/ri.dir/r_df_incore.c.o   -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib  -L/Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/deps/lib64  -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/deps/lib64 -lcint /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libao2mo.dylib -framework Accelerate /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libcvhf.dylib /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libcgto.dylib -lcint /Users/arpan/Library/pyscf/pyscf/lib/libnp_helper.dylib -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib
